---
title: "Certifications & Micro-Applications"
description: "My verified credentials and applied digital marketing coursework."
format: html
---

## Verified Certifications

::: {style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr)); gap: 2rem; margin-top: 2rem; margin-bottom: 4rem;"}

::: {.glass-card}
### Google Analytics 4 Certification
**Issuer:** Google
<br>
Completed comprehensive training on GA4 setup, tracking, and insights generation.
[View Certificate (PDF)](assets/Asif%20Kachroo%20GA4%20(1).pdf)
:::

::: {.glass-card}
### Power BI Essential Training
**Issuer:** LinkedIn Learning
<br>
Demonstrated ability to connect data sources, transform data, and build interactive Power BI dashboards.
[View Certificate (PDF)](assets/CertificateOfCompletion_Power%20BI%20Essential%20Training%202024%20(1).pdf)
:::

::: {.glass-card}
### Excel PivotTables in Depth
**Issuer:** LinkedIn Learning
<br>
Advanced spreadsheet manipulation, dynamic data summaries, and pivot reporting.
[View Certificate (PDF)](assets/CertificateOfCompletion_Excel%20PivotTables%20in%20Depth%20(1).pdf)
:::

:::

## Digital Marketing Micro-Applications

Throughout my coursework, I have completed practical applications in GA4 to prove hands-on mastery.

::: {style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr)); gap: 2rem; margin-top: 2rem;"}

::: {.glass-card}
### GA4 201: Explorations & Deep Analysis
Applied deeper analysis techniques using GA4 custom exploration reports.
[View HTML Report](assets/GA4%20201%20Micro-Application%20%20Explorations%20(Deeper%20Analysis)%20(1).html)
:::

::: {.glass-card}
### GA4 301: Integrations & Activation Plan
Developed an activation plan mapping tracking implementations to business outcomes.
[View HTML Report](assets/Part%204%20%20GA4%20301%20Micro-Application_%20Integrations%20&%20Activation%20Plan.html)
:::

::: {.glass-card}
### Certification Reflection & Readiness Check
A reflective essay on preparing for and passing the official GA4 exam.
[View HTML Report](assets/GA4%20Certification%20Reflection%20and%20Readiness%20Check.html)
:::

:::
